bird.name: 杰氏鹛雀
bird.summary: 杰氏鹛雀（台湾作則東氏鶥雀）（学名：Chrysomma altirostre），是雀形目鸦雀科的一种鸟类。 杰氏鹛雀体重约20克，翼长约60毫米，嘴峰长约12.2毫米，喙宽度约3.8毫米，喙厚度约5.6毫米，跗蹠长约24.9毫米，尾长约90.8毫米。杰氏鹛雀在其分布区内为留鸟，…

relations.subject: 杰氏鹛雀
relations.evidence: Jerdon's babbler lives all-year-round near river courses, where it inhabits dense reedbeds and tall grasslands consisting of cogongrass (Imperata cylindrica), common reed (Phragmites) and reedmace (Typha) species. In Pakistan, it occurs along the Indus and its tributaries.{{cite journal |author=Showler, D
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: 杰氏鹛雀
relations.evidence: The reasons are not fully understood, but the population reduction is probably related to habitat destruction by drainage and damming of wetlands for agriculture and flood control, and these threats are not expected to cease anytime soon
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
